sentences.text_original: 你养宠物吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yǎng chǒngwù ma?
sentences.text_translation: Uy hayvoni boqasanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: У тебя есть домашнее животное?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you have a pet?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 养。我有一只狗，它叫小黑。
sentences.pinyin: Yǎng. Wǒ yǒu yì zhī gǒu, tā jiào Xiǎo Hēi.
sentences.text_translation: Ha. Mening bir itim bor, ismi Xiao Hei.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Есть. У меня собака, её зовут Сяо Хэй.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes. I have a dog named Xiao Hei.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 小黑是什么品种？
sentences.pinyin: Xiǎo Hēi shì shénme pǐnzhǒng?
sentences.text_translation: Xiao Hei qaysi zotdan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Какой породы Сяо Хэй?
sentences.text_translation_en: What breed is Xiao Hei?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 是泰迪。它不大，但是特别聪明。
sentences.pinyin: Shì Tàidí. Tā bú dà, dànshì tèbié cōngming.
sentences.text_translation: Teddi. U katta emas, lekin juda aqlli.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тедди. Он небольшой, но очень умный.
sentences.text_translation_en: A Teddy (toy poodle). He's small but really smart.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 它多大了？
sentences.pinyin: Tā duō dà le?
sentences.text_translation: U necha yoshda?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сколько ему лет?
sentences.text_translation_en: How old is he?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 两岁多了。已经跟我住了快两年。
sentences.pinyin: Liǎng suì duō le. Yǐjīng gēn wǒ zhù le kuài liǎng nián.
sentences.text_translation: Ikki yoshdan oshdi. Men bilan deyarli ikki yildan beri yashayapti.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Чуть больше двух лет. Живёт со мной уже почти два года.
sentences.text_translation_en: Over two years old. He's lived with me for almost two years now.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你平时怎么照顾它？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ píngshí zěnme zhàogù tā?
sentences.text_translation: Odatda unga qanday g'amxo'rlik qilasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Как ты обычно за ним ухаживаешь?
sentences.text_translation_en: How do you usually take care of him?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 每天喂两次，早晚各一次。每周带它出去散步三四次。
sentences.pinyin: Měitiān wèi liǎng cì, zǎowǎn gè yí cì. Měi zhōu dài tā chūqù sànbù sān sì cì.
sentences.text_translation: Har kuni ikki marta — ertalab va kechqurun bir martadan ovqatlantiraman. Har hafta uch-to'rt marta sayrga olib chiqaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Кормлю дважды в день, утром и вечером по разу. Раз в неделю вывожу гулять три-четыре раза.
sentences.text_translation_en: I feed him twice a day, once in the morning and once in the evening. I take him out for walks three or four times a week.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 散步多久？
sentences.pinyin: Sànbù duō jiǔ?
sentences.text_translation: Sayr qancha davom etadi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сколько длится прогулка?
sentences.text_translation_en: How long are the walks?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 一般半小时左右。它很喜欢在外面跑。
sentences.pinyin: Yìbān bàn xiǎoshí zuǒyòu. Tā hěn xǐhuān zài wàimiàn pǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Odatda yarim soatcha. U tashqarida yugurishni juda yaxshi ko'radi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Обычно около получаса. Он очень любит бегать на улице.
sentences.text_translation_en: Usually about half an hour. He loves running around outside.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 养狗需要花很多时间和钱吗？
sentences.pinyin: Yǎng gǒu xūyào huā hěn duō shíjiān hé qián ma?
sentences.text_translation: It boqish ko'p vaqt va pul talab qiladimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Содержать собаку требует много времени и денег?
sentences.text_translation_en: Does keeping a dog take a lot of time and money?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 时间和钱都要花一些。但是我觉得很值得。
sentences.pinyin: Shíjiān hé qián dōu yào huā yì xiē. Dànshì wǒ juéde hěn zhídé.
sentences.text_translation: Biroz vaqt ham, pul ham ketadi. Lekin menimcha buning arzigulik joyi bor.
sentences.text_translation_ru: И время, и деньги нужны. Но, по-моему, оно того стоит.
sentences.text_translation_en: Both time and money, yes. But I think it's totally worth it.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 每个月大概花多少钱？
sentences.pinyin: Měi ge yuè dàgài huā duōshao qián?
sentences.text_translation: Oyiga taxminan qancha pul ketadi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сколько примерно уходит в месяц?
sentences.text_translation_en: About how much do you spend a month?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 五百块左右，包括狗粮、零食和洗澡。
sentences.pinyin: Wǔ bǎi kuài zuǒyòu, bāokuò gǒuliáng, língshí hé xǐzǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Besh yuz yuancha — it ozuqasi, gazaklar va cho'miltirishni qo'shib.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Около пятисот юаней, включая корм, лакомства и купание.
sentences.text_translation_en: Around five hundred yuan, including dog food, treats and baths.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 它生病的时候怎么办？
sentences.pinyin: Tā shēngbìng de shíhou zěnme bàn?
sentences.text_translation: U kasal bo'lib qolsa nima qilasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: А что делать, когда он болеет?
sentences.text_translation_en: What do you do when he gets sick?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我会带它去看兽医。幸好它身体一直不错。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ huì dài tā qù kàn shòuyī. Xìnghǎo tā shēntǐ yìzhí búcuò.
sentences.text_translation: Uni veterinarga olib boraman. Yaxshiyamki, u doim sog'lom bo'lib turibdi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Веду его к ветеринару. К счастью, он всё время довольно здоров.
sentences.text_translation_en: I take him to the vet. Luckily, his health has always been good.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 养狗最大的快乐是什么？
sentences.pinyin: Yǎng gǒu zuì dà de kuàilè shì shénme?
sentences.text_translation: It boqishning eng katta quvonchi nima?
sentences.text_translation_ru: В чём самая большая радость от собаки?
sentences.text_translation_en: What's the greatest joy of having a dog?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 它总是很热情地欢迎我回家。看到它我就很开心。
sentences.pinyin: Tā zǒng shì hěn rèqíng de huānyíng wǒ huí jiā. Kàn dào tā wǒ jiù hěn kāixīn.
sentences.text_translation: U meni uyga qaytganimda doim iliq kutib oladi. Uni ko'rsam, darrov xursand bo'laman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Он всегда тепло встречает меня дома. Как только вижу его, сразу радуюсь.
sentences.text_translation_en: He always greets me warmly when I come home. Just seeing him makes me happy.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我也想养一只，但是怕麻烦。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yě xiǎng yǎng yì zhī, dànshì pà máfan.
sentences.text_translation: Men ham bitta boqmoqchiman, lekin ovoragarchilikdan qo'rqaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я тоже хочу завести, но боюсь хлопот.
sentences.text_translation_en: I'd like to get one too, but I'm afraid of the hassle.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 确实需要花心思，但是回报也很多。
sentences.pinyin: Quèshí xūyào huā xīnsi, dànshì huíbào yě hěn duō.
sentences.text_translation: Haqiqatan ham mehnat va e'tibor talab qiladi, lekin evaziga ham ko'p narsa beradi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Действительно нужно вкладывать силы, но и отдача большая.
sentences.text_translation_en: It really does take effort, but the rewards are great too.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 谢谢你的建议，我再考虑考虑。
sentences.pinyin: Xièxie nǐ de jiànyì, wǒ zài kǎolǜ kǎolǜ.
sentences.text_translation: Maslahating uchun rahmat, yana bir o'ylab ko'raman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Спасибо за совет, я ещё подумаю.
sentences.text_translation_en: Thanks for the advice, I'll think it over a bit more.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不客气。如果你想养，到时候可以问我。
sentences.pinyin: Bú kèqi. Rúguǒ nǐ xiǎng yǎng, dàoshíhou kěyǐ wèn wǒ.
sentences.text_translation: Arzimaydi. Agar boqmoqchi bo'lsang, o'shanda mendan so'rashing mumkin.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не за что. Если захочешь завести, тогда можешь спросить меня.
sentences.text_translation_en: You're welcome. If you decide to get one, you can ask me then.
sentences.speaker: B
